Vue Iframe Wrapper
Main Navigation GuideAPIParametersSecurity

Appearance

Vue Iframe WrapperControlled CSS & JS injection for Vue 3

A secure, testable abstraction over the native iframe, built for enterprise use.

Get Started
API Reference

Same-origin safe

Every document access goes through a guarded accessor that turns cross-origin failures into typed errors instead of uncaught exceptions.

Declarative or imperative

Configure css/cssUrls/js/jsUrls as props for automatic injection, or call injectCss/injectJs yourself for full control.

Enterprise ready

90%+ test coverage gates, strict ESLint/TypeScript, CI/CD workflows, and CODEOWNERS out of the box.
